title: Meeting Notes Pro — Notion Template
description:
Stop losing decisions, action items, and follow-ups in scattered docs and endless email threads. Meeting Notes Pro is a complete Notion workspace that covers the entire meeting lifecycle — from agenda prep to post-meeting accountability.

Built around 5 interconnected databases (Meetings, Action Items, People, Projects & Teams, and Agenda Templates), this template gives you a single source of truth for every meeting your team runs. Automatically calculate meeting duration, track overdue tasks, and roll up open action counts by person or project — all without manual effort.

The dashboard surfaces upcoming meetings, your open action items, and overdue tasks the moment you open Notion. Twelve pre-built database views let you slice your data by status, owner, priority, project, or date. A built-in Analytics page helps you spot bottlenecks and measure team accountability over time.

Perfect for project managers, team leads, executive assistants, product managers, and remote-first teams of 5–25 people. Whether you run daily standups or quarterly planning sessions, this template keeps everyone aligned and nothing falls through the cracks.

Includes a full How-To guide, a 3-step getting-started flow, and reusable agenda templates for 8 common meeting types. One-time purchase, instant download.
